findings.title: No concurrency group — superseded runs keep running
findings.message: This push/PR workflow has no top-level `concurrency`, so a new commit doesn't cancel the previous run.
findings.fix:
Add:
concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

findings.title: setup-node without dependency caching
findings.message: Job "test" runs setup-node without `cache`, reinstalling dependencies every run.
findings.fix: Enable caching, e.g. add `with: { cache: 'npm' }` to the setup-node step.

findings.title: setup-node without dependency caching
findings.message: Job "mac-build" runs setup-node without `cache`, reinstalling dependencies every run.
findings.fix: Enable caching, e.g. add `with: { cache: 'npm' }` to the setup-node step.

findings.title: push + pull_request run CI twice per PR commit
findings.message: Both `push` and `pull_request` fire, and `push` has no branch filter — so each PR commit triggers two full runs.
findings.fix:
Limit push to your main branches:
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:

findings.title: Matrix expands to 12 jobs
findings.message: Job "test" fans out to 12 parallel jobs (node(4) × os-target(3)).
findings.detail: Every combination pays full setup + install + the rest of the job.
findings.fix: Trim the matrix to the combinations you actually ship, or use `include` for the few extras.

findings.title: Schedule runs every ~5 min
findings.message: Cron "*/5 * * * *" fires roughly 288×/day — each run bills full runner time.
findings.fix: Run less often (≥ every 15 min) unless the frequency is truly required.

findings.title: macOS runner bills at 10× Linux
findings.message: Job "mac-build" uses a macOS runner, charged at 10× the Linux minute rate.
findings.fix: Run on ubuntu-latest where possible, and reserve macOS for the few jobs that need it.

findings.title: Job has no timeout-minutes
findings.message: Job "test" can run up to GitHub's 360-minute default if it hangs.
findings.fix: Add `timeout-minutes: 15` (or a sensible cap) to the job.

findings.title: Job has no timeout-minutes
findings.message: Job "mac-build" can run up to GitHub's 360-minute default if it hangs.
findings.fix: Add `timeout-minutes: 15` (or a sensible cap) to the job.

findings.title: `push` has no paths filter
findings.message: `push` runs the whole workflow even for changes that can't affect it (docs, README…).
findings.fix: Add `paths:` (or `paths-ignore:`) so unrelated changes skip CI.

findings.title: `pull_request` has no paths filter
findings.message: `pull_request` runs the whole workflow even for changes that can't affect it (docs, README…).
findings.fix: Add `paths:` (or `paths-ignore:`) so unrelated changes skip CI.

findings.title: checkout fetches full git history (fetch-depth: 0)
findings.message: Job "test" clones the entire history, which is slow on large repos.
findings.fix: Drop `fetch-depth: 0` unless a step truly needs full history.
